encoding_groups.name: BranchExchange
encoding_groups.comment: BX must be matched BEFORE Data Processing because its mask (0x0FFFFFF0) is more specific and overlaps the bits 27:25=000 + bit 4=1 region used by RegRegShift.

encoding_groups.name: PSRTransfer
encoding_groups.comment: PSR Transfer (MRS/MSR) overlaps with the Data Processing encoding space when opcode is 10xx and S=0. Listed before DataProcessing so priority lookup matches PSR encodings first.

formats.name: PSR_MRS
formats.comment: cccc 0001 0P00 1111 dddd 0000 0000 0000  (MRS Rd, CPSR/SPSR)

formats.name: PSR_MSR_Reg
formats.comment: cccc 0001 0P10 ffff 1111 0000 0000 mmmm  (MSR PSR_<f>, Rm)

formats.name: PSR_MSR_Imm
formats.comment: cccc 0011 0P10 ffff 1111 rrrr iiii iiii  (MSR PSR_<f>, #imm)

encoding_groups.name: Multiply
encoding_groups.comment: ARMv4 32-bit multiply (MUL) and multiply-accumulate (MLA). Encoded with bits 27:22 = 000000 + bits 7:4 = 1001. Uses the unusual register-position swap where Rd is at bits 19:16 and Rn (accumulate) is at bits 15:12.

formats.name: Multiply_32
formats.comment: cccc 000000 a s dddd nnnn pppp 1001 mmmm  (MUL/MLA Rd, Rm, Rs[, Rn])

encoding_groups.name: MultiplyLong
encoding_groups.comment: ARMv4 32x32 -> 64 multiply (UMULL/UMLAL/SMULL/SMLAL). Encoded with bits 27:23 = 00001 + bits 7:4 = 1001. Bit 22 selects signed (1) vs unsigned (0); bit 21 selects accumulate (1) vs not (0). Combined as the 'ua' field for selector dispatch.

formats.name: MultiplyLong
formats.comment: cccc 00001 kk s hhhh llll pppp 1001 mmmm  (kk = U:A select)

encoding_groups.name: DataProcessing
encoding_groups.comment: Three encoding variants (Immediate, RegImmShift, RegRegShift) share the same 16-opcode ALU table. Step lists are identical across variants — only the op2 operand resolution differs.

formats.name: DataProcessing_RegRegShift
formats.comment: cccc 000 oooo s nnnn dddd SSSS 0 tt 1 mmmm  (Rm shifted by Rs)

formats.name: DataProcessing_RegImmShift
formats.comment: cccc 000 oooo s nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (Rm shifted by 5-bit immediate)

formats.name: DataProcessing_Immediate
formats.comment: cccc 001 oooo s nnnn dddd rrrr iiiiiiii (8-bit imm rotated by 2*rrrr)

encoding_groups.name: SingleDataTransfer
encoding_groups.comment: ARM Single Data Transfer (LDR/STR + byte/word). Eight formats: (L,B) × {immediate offset, shifted-register offset}. P/U/W decoded at runtime via select / if.

formats.name: SDT_Reg_STR
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 0 W 0 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (STR Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Reg_LDR
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (LDR Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Reg_STRB
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 1 W 0 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (STRB Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Reg_LDRB
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (LDRB Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_STR
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 0 W 0 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (STR Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_LDR
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (LDR Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_STRB
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 1 W 0 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (STRB Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_LDRB
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (LDRB Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

encoding_groups.name: HalfwordSignedDataTransfer
encoding_groups.comment: Halfword and signed-byte loads/stores (ARMv4 LDRH/STRH/LDRSB/LDRSH). Encoded in DataProcessing space (bits 27:25=000) but distinguished by bit 7=1 + bit 4=1. SH bits at 6:5 select halfword vs signed byte. Eight formats: 4 ops × {immediate, register} offset.

formats.name: HSDT_Imm_STRH
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 1 W 0 nnnn dddd aaaa 1 0 1 1 bbbb  (STRH Rd, [Rn ± imm8])

formats.name: HSDT_Imm_LDRH
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaa 1 0 1 1 bbbb  (LDRH Rd, [Rn ± imm8])

formats.name: HSDT_Imm_LDRSB
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaa 1 1 0 1 bbbb  (LDRSB Rd, [Rn ± imm8])

formats.name: HSDT_Imm_LDRSH
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaa 1 1 1 1 bbbb  (LDRSH Rd, [Rn ± imm8])

formats.name: HSDT_Reg_STRH
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 0 W 0 nnnn dddd 0000 1 0 1 1 mmmm  (STRH Rd, [Rn ± Rm])

formats.name: HSDT_Reg_LDRH
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd 0000 1 0 1 1 mmmm  (LDRH Rd, [Rn ± Rm])

formats.name: HSDT_Reg_LDRSB
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd 0000 1 1 0 1 mmmm  (LDRSB Rd, [Rn ± Rm])

formats.name: HSDT_Reg_LDRSH
formats.comment: cccc 000 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd 0000 1 1 1 1 mmmm  (LDRSH Rd, [Rn ± Rm])

encoding_groups.name: SingleDataSwap
encoding_groups.comment: ARM atomic swap (SWP/SWPB). Encoded in DataProcessing space (bits 27:23 = 00010, bit 22 = B) with bits 7:4 = 1001. Distinguished from Multiply (bits 27:22 = 000000) by bit 24 = 1.

formats.name: SWP_Word
formats.comment: cccc 00010 0 00 nnnn dddd 0000 1001 mmmm  (SWP Rd, Rm, [Rn])

formats.name: SWP_Byte
formats.comment: cccc 00010 1 00 nnnn dddd 0000 1001 mmmm  (SWPB Rd, Rm, [Rn])

encoding_groups.name: BlockDataTransfer
encoding_groups.comment: LDM/STM with all 4 P/U addressing modes (IA/IB/DA/DB), S-bit (user-mode access — not yet modelled), W-bit (writeback). Two formats distinguished by L bit; the runtime block_load/block_store emitter handles all P/U/W combinations via select.

formats.name: BDT_LDM
formats.comment: cccc 100 P U S W 1 nnnn rrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr  (LDM Rn{!}, {reg list})

formats.name: BDT_STM
formats.comment: cccc 100 P U S W 0 nnnn rrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr  (STM Rn{!}, {reg list})

formats.name: Branch_BL
formats.comment: cccc 101 L oooooooooooooooooooooooo (24-bit signed offset, <<2)
